rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LINA CALDERON FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Remove Mauricio Calderon, As Trustee And To Surcharge Mauricio Calderon For Breaches Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duties; Et Al
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/16/16. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action (including petitions filed conventionally to initiate a case) needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T, 14.91F]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
